market_pulse: Competitive landscape shows sustained DJ residencies and strong daytime activation across the Strip; LIV maintaining solid presence with recurring DJs while competitors focus on guest-star rotations.

content_gaps.description: Multi-day influencer takeovers during peak days (weekends/Thurs) are missing from LIV's social strategy; competitors using creator partnerships for story depth.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Secure 1-2 micro-influencers per weekend for 24h story takeovers of LIV Beach; focus on Gen-Z lifestyle creators (100k-500k followers)

content_gaps.description: Limited BTS content showing setup, prep, artist arrivals, sound check. Competitors posting energy-building countdown content 2-3 hours pre-event.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3-5 short BTS reels per event (artist arrival, soundcheck, VIP lounge prep); post 2-3h before doors open to build FOMO

content_gaps.description: Sound-synced dance videos on TikTok are rare from LIV; other clubs leveraging trending tracks and summer hype audios.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Partner with 2-3 dance creators to produce audio-matched content; target summer EDM + house trending sounds on TikTok
